title: Senior Sales Executive
description:
🌿 Grow Your Career with OneO2Plants: Senior Sales Executive

Location: East Area
Employment Type: Full-Time, Permanent
Working Hours: Mondays – Fridays, 8.30am–5.30pm (weekends & PH off)
Salary Range: $3,500 – $3,800 per month
Annual Leave: 14 days

About the Role

Do you have a background in landscape or horticulture and a passion for transforming spaces with greenery?


At OneO2Plants, we are looking for a Senior Sales Executive who can combine plant knowledge with sales acumen to deliver tailored indoor plant and landscaping solutions. You’ll play a key role in helping businesses and homeowners create environments that are healthier, greener, and more inspiring.

What You’ll Do

  • Leverage your horticulture/landscape expertise to understand client needs and recommend suitable plant solutions.
  • Grow our client base by identifying and securing new business opportunities.
  • Provide professional consultation, proposals, and creative plant concepts to clients.
  • Manage and deepen client relationships to ensure long-term satisfaction.
  • Negotiate and close deals to achieve sales targets and revenue growth.
  • Collaborate with our operations and design teams to deliver seamless solutions.

What We’re Looking For

Background & Experience:

  • Diploma/Degree in Landscape Architecture, Horticulture, or related fields.
  • At least 2 years of industry experience (plants, landscape design, horticulture, or related sales).

Skills & Strengths:

  • Passion for plants, greenery, and creating sustainable spaces.
  • Strong communication and presentation skills to translate technical knowledge into client solutions.
  • Proven ability to negotiate, close deals, and achieve results.
  • Analytical thinker with problem-solving abilities.
  • Comfortable using digital tools (Microsoft Dynamics 365 or equivalent).

Personal Traits:

  • Proactive and independent, yet collaborative.
  • Self-motivated, results-driven, and client-oriented.
  • Enthusiastic about bringing the beauty of nature into people’s spaces.

Why Join Us?

At OneO2Plants, you’ll do more than sales—you’ll be an advocate for greenery and design. Here, your horticultural knowledge and creativity will directly contribute to shaping healthier workplaces, homes, and communities.

We value professionals who want to grow with us and make a real impact in the landscape industry.

postedCompany.description:
OneO2Plants PTE. LTD.

Established in 2008, OneO2Plants is a subsidiary of Far East Flora – an integrated floriculture firm with over 40 years of experience. We endeavor to bring life and freshness to the space of every business in Asia by making our extensive range of plants and pots available for rent in your office space.

With our wide variety of plants and European pot designs, OneO2Plants can provide the options and service level you require. We are able to provide plant rental for offices, restaurants, hotels, commercial buildings, shopping malls, and events. Our rapidly growing clientele in Singapore can attest to our quality service, enthusiasm and reliability. With renewable annual rental contracts, our plant nurturers will visit your premises every fortnightly to ensure that your plants stay healthy and fresh throughout the year.

Our other services also include plants for events, plants for purchase and floral arrangements. Whichever service you require, you can be assured that customer satisfaction is our number one priority.
postedCompany.name: ONEO2PLANTS PTE. LTD.
